description_long: This cash register features a robust, rectangular beige body with a recessed black countertop area housing a keyboard and a central display screen. The display is upright and shows a green digital interface, suggesting active transaction processing. The keyboard area is slightly sunken, with visible red and black keys, likely for numeric and function input. The sides and back of the register are solid and unadorned, emphasizing its utilitarian design. The front has an open space beneath the keyboard, possibly for a cash drawer or storage compartment. The overall construction appears sturdy, suitable for high-traffic urban retail environments.
description: A sturdy beige cash register with a digital display, sunken keyboard, and a solid, functional design. The front features an open space likely for a cash drawer.
description_view_0: Front view showing the digital display, sunken keyboard with red and black keys, and an open space beneath the keyboard.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness of the body, the upright display, and the edge of the keyboard area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid beige back with the top of the display visible above the main body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the upright display and the side profile of the keyboard area.
attribute_keypad_layout: rectangular grid with multiple rows of red and black keys, likely numeric and function keys
